recommendations.title: Foo Fighters: Back and Forth
recommendations.overview: FOO FIGHTERS BACK AND FORTH chronicles the 16 year history of the Foo Fighters: from the band's very first songs created as cassette demos Dave Grohl recorded during his tenure as Nirvana's drummer, through its ascent to their Grammy-winning, multi-p

recommendations.title: Becoming Led Zeppelin
recommendations.overview: The individual journeys of the four members of the band, as they move through the music scene of the 1960s, playing small clubs throughout Britain and performing some of the biggest hits of the era, until their meeting in the summer of 1968 for a reh

recommendations.title: One Direction: Where We Are - The Concert Film
recommendations.overview: Where We Are: Live from San Siro Stadium features the entire 23 track concert filmed at San Siro Stadium in Milan in June 2014, as well as 24 minutes of bonus content including backstage footage of One Direction and their crew.

recommendations.title: Taylor Swift: Reputation Stadium Tour
recommendations.overview: Taylor Swift takes the stage in Dallas for the Reputation Stadium Tour and celebrates a monumental night of music, memories and visual magic.

recommendations.title: Bandslam
recommendations.overview: A  new kid in town assembles a fledgling rock band — together, they achieve their dreams and compete against the best in the biggest event of the year, a battle of the bands.

recommendations.title: 20 Feet from Stardom
recommendations.overview: Backup singers live in a world that lies just beyond the spotlight. Their voices bring harmony to the biggest bands in popular music, but we've had no idea who these singers are or what lives they lead, until now.

recommendations.title: Taylor Swift: The 1989 World Tour - Live
recommendations.overview: Filmed in front of 76,000 fans at the ANZ Stadium in Sydney, Australia, "The 1989 World Tour Live" captures Taylor Swift's entire performance while also mixing in behind-the-scene, rehearsal, and special guest footage from her 1989 Tour.

recommendations.title: Demi Lovato: Simply Complicated
recommendations.overview: A personal and intimate look into Demi Lovato's life as not only a regular 25 year old, but also one of the biggest pop stars in the world.

recommendations.title: BTS World Tour: Love Yourself in Seoul
recommendations.overview: Shot at the Olympic Stadium in Seoul during the BTS World Tour ‘Love Yourself’ to celebrate the seven members of the global boyband and their unprecedented international phenomenon.

recommendations.title: Karol G: Tomorrow Was Beautiful
recommendations.overview: Karol G pulls back the curtain on her rise to stardom while navigating a sold-out stadium tour, creating new music and releasing a new album.
